testcase.name: core/example_io.py

testcase.name: ecology/example_community.py
testcase.failure: Traceback (most recent call last): File "/Volumes/blue/metainformant/examples/ecology/example_community.py", line 65, in <module> main() File "/Volumes/blue/metainformant/examples/ecology/example_community.py", line 43, in main metrics = community_metrics(site_abundances) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/Volumes/blue/metainformant/src/metainformant/ecology/analysis/community.py", line 796, in community_metrics "richness": species_richness_simple(abundances), ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/Volumes/blue/metainformant/src/metainformant/ecology/analysis/community.py", line 700, in species_richness_simple if not abundances: ValueError: The truth value of an array with more than one element is ambiguous.
